question: Did Lx_RepairLoop really execute as a repair loop?

distinction.repair_loop_n_json: required execution evidence for an actual Lx repair-loop iteration
distinction.candidate_regeneration: candidate generation evidence, not sufficient by itself to prove a repair atom was selected, applied, and rechecked

why_unfixed_failures_remained: R12_00005_2025_interim_report_zh had blocking product-quality failures and repair plans, but no recorded repair atom execution.
R12_00992_2023_annual_report_en had blocking product-quality failures and repair plans, but no recorded repair atom execution.
why_jianye_cases_appeared_to_pass: Their product_quality_gates.json had no blocking failures.
Their visual_repair_plan.json records only non-blocking warning-level repairs.
Current gates did not block on several human-aesthetic issues such as weak title hierarchy, unnatural notice wording, paragraph rhythm, or large local blank gaps.
required_contract_fix: Entering Lx_RepairLoop must require at least one repair_loop_<n>.json record.
D8 output must include repair_loop_record_path and execution_status.
validate_process_artifacts.py must fail when Lx is entered without repair_loop_<n>.json.
